github.title: Implement local OneNote cache prototype
github.snippet: Added Markdown-backed cache pages to mirror OneNote notebook, section, and date page semantics.

github.title: Wire range summaries to cached daily pages
github.snippet: Range reports now reuse daily summaries and only fetch missing dates.

ado.title: ADO 4908: Support goal and OKR aligned response mode
ado.snippet: Completed acceptance criteria for response-only goal and OKR shaping without mutating cached daily notes.

m365.title: Hackathon design review
m365.snippet: Aligned on demo flow: daily report, date range report, and evidence search from cached OneNote pages.

m365.title: Shared video demo outline
m365.snippet: Posted the planned video script with cache lookup, live fetch fallback, and OKR alignment scenes.
